---
title: "Community Contributions"
description: "Community contributions submitted to ISA RC42."
toc: false
---

This page presents community contributions submitted to ISA RC42 and reviewed by the editorial team before publication. Please note that publication is not automatic; all submissions pass through editorial review.

::: {#filters-container .mb-4 style="display: flex; gap: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap;"}
<select id="filter-type" class="form-select form-select-sm" style="width: auto;">
  <option value="">All Types</option>
</select>
<select id="filter-category" class="form-select form-select-sm" style="width: auto;">
  <option value="">All Categories</option>
</select>
<select id="filter-language" class="form-select form-select-sm" style="width: auto;">
  <option value="">All Languages</option>
</select>
:::

::: {#contributions-container}
<div class="spinner-border text-primary" role="status">
  <span class="visually-hidden">Loading...</span>
</div>
:::

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", async function() {
  const container = document.getElementById('contributions-container');
  const typeFilter = document.getElementById('filter-type');
  const categoryFilter = document.getElementById('filter-category');
  const languageFilter = document.getElementById('filter-language');
  
  let allData = [];

  try {
    const response = await fetch('/data/community_submissions.json');
    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error("Data not found");
    }
    allData = await response.json();
    
    // Sort descending by date_published
    allData.sort((a, b) => new Date(b.date_published) - new Date(a.date_published));
    
    if (allData.length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = '<p class="text-muted">No community contributions are available yet.</p>';
      document.getElementById('filters-container').style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }
    
    // Populate filter options
    const types = [...new Set(allData.map(d => d.type).filter(Boolean))].sort();
    const categories = [...new Set(allData.map(d => d.category).filter(Boolean))].sort();
    const languages = [...new Set(allData.map(d => d.language).filter(Boolean))].sort();
    
    types.forEach(t => typeFilter.add(new Option(t, t)));
    categories.forEach(c => categoryFilter.add(new Option(c, c)));
    languages.forEach(l => languageFilter.add(new Option(l, l)));
    
    renderCards(allData);
    
    typeFilter.addEventListener('change', filterData);
    categoryFilter.addEventListener('change', filterData);
    languageFilter.addEventListener('change', filterData);

  } catch (error) {
    container.innerHTML = '<p class="text-muted">No community contributions are available yet.</p>';
    document.getElementById('filters-container').style.display = 'none';
  }

  function filterData() {
    const tVal = typeFilter.value;
    const cVal = categoryFilter.value;
    const lVal = languageFilter.value;
    
    const filtered = allData.filter(d => {
      return (!tVal || d.type === tVal) &&
             (!cVal || d.category === cVal) &&
             (!lVal || d.language === lVal);
    });
    
    renderCards(filtered);
  }

  function normalizeType(t) {
    if (!t) return 'other';
    const l = t.toLowerCase();
    if (l.includes('news')) return 'news';
    if (l.includes('event')) return 'event';
    if (l.includes('resource')) return 'resource';
    if (l.includes('call') || l.includes('opportunity')) return 'call';
    if (l.includes('publication')) return 'publication';
    if (l.includes('experience')) return 'experience';
    return 'other';
  }
  
  function getTypeImage(type) {
    const normalized = normalizeType(type);
    const imageMap = {
      news: "/images/community-types/news.svg",
      event: "/images/community-types/event.svg",
      resource: "/images/community-types/resource.svg",
      call: "/images/community-types/call.svg",
      publication: "/images/community-types/publication.svg",
      experience: "/images/community-types/experience.svg",
      other: "/images/community-types/other.svg"
    };
    return imageMap[normalized] || imageMap.other;
  }
  
  function getTypeAltText(type) {
    const normalized = normalizeType(type);
    const altMap = {
      news: "Illustration representing a news contribution",
      event: "Illustration representing an event contribution",
      resource: "Illustration representing a resource contribution",
      call: "Illustration representing a call or opportunity",
      publication: "Illustration representing a publication",
      experience: "Illustration representing a community experience",
      other: "Illustration representing another type of contribution"
    };
    return altMap[normalized] || altMap.other;
  }

  function renderCards(data) {
    if (data.length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = '<p class="text-muted">No matches found for the selected filters.</p>';
      return;
    }
    
    let html = '<div class="row g-4">';
    data.forEach(item => {
      // Escape HTML to prevent injection
      const title = escapeHtml(item.title);
      const desc = escapeHtml(item.description);
      const type = escapeHtml(item.type);
      const cat = escapeHtml(item.category);
      const date = escapeHtml(item.date_published);
      const url = escapeHtml(item.url || '');
      const org = escapeHtml(item.organization || item.territory || '');
      const member = escapeHtml(item.member_display_name || '');
      
      const tags = (item.tags || []).map(t => `<span class="badge bg-secondary me-1 mb-1">${escapeHtml(t)}</span>`).join('');
      
      const cardTitle = url ? `<a href="${url}" target="_blank" class="text-decoration-none">${title}</a>` : title;
      const subtitle = [type || 'Other', cat].filter(Boolean).join(' • ');
      
      const imgSrc = getTypeImage(item.type);
      const imgAlt = getTypeAltText(item.type);
      
      html += `
        <div class="col-12">
          <div class="card shadow-sm border-0 bg-light overflow-hidden">
            <div class="row g-0 h-100">
              <div class="col-md-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center p-4 bg-white border-end">
                <img src="${imgSrc}" class="img-fluid" style="max-height: 140px; width: auto; opacity: 0.85;" alt="${imgAlt}">
              </div>
              <div class="col-md-9">
                <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column h-100">
                  <div class="text-muted small mb-2 text-uppercase fw-semibold" style="letter-spacing: 0.5px;">${subtitle}</div>
                  <h5 class="card-title fw-bold mb-3">${cardTitle}</h5>
                  <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">${desc}</p>
                  
                  <div class="mt-3">
                    <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-2">
                      <small class="text-muted"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> ${date}</small>
                      ${org ? `<small class="text-muted"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> ${org}</small>` : ''}
                    </div>
                    ${member ? `<div class="mb-2"><small class="text-muted">By ${member}</small></div>` : ''}
                    ${tags ? `<div>${tags}</div>` : ''}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      `;
    });
    html += '</div>';
    container.innerHTML = html;
  }

  function escapeHtml(unsafe) {
    return (unsafe || "").toString()
         .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
         .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
         .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
         .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
         .replace(/'/g, "&#039;");
  }
});
</script>
